Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), cmake, doxygen <!nodoc>, libcups2-dev, libdframeworkdbus-dev (>= 6), libdtk6core-bin (>= 6.7.43), libdtk6core-dev (>= 6.7.43), libdtk6gui-dev (>= 6.7.43), libdtk6log-dev (>= 6.7.43), libegl1-mesa-dev, libfontconfig-dev, libfreetype-dev, libglib2.0-dev, libgsettings-qt6-dev, libgmock-dev, libgtest-dev, libmtdev-dev, libstartup-notification0-dev, libudev-dev, libxcb-util-dev, libxext-dev, libxi-dev, libxrender-dev, pkgconf, qt6-base-dev, qt6-base-dev-tools, qt6-base-private-dev, qt6-svg-dev, qt6-tools-dev, x11proto-xext-dev
Description: Deepin QT6 Tool Kit Widget library Dtk6Widget is the Deepin graphical user interface library for deepin desktop development. . This package is part of DDE (Deepin Desktop Environment).
Package-List: dtk6widget6-examples deb libs optional arch=any libdtk6widget-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libdtk6widget-doc deb doc optional arch=all profile=!nodoc profile:v1=!nodoc libdtk6widget6 deb libs optional arch=any libdtk6widget6-bin deb libs optional arch=any
